title: Kafka Connect Component Discovery
description: Platform discovers connectors, transforms, and converters available in Kafka Connect classpath via JAR scanning and Jandex bytecode indexing.

actors.name: SchemaGenerator Platform
actors.role: Initiates component discovery by calling KafkaConnectDiscoveryService

actors.name: JVM ClassLoader
actors.role: Resolves META-INF/services resources on the classpath to locate KC JARs

actors.name: JAR File System
actors.role: Provides .class files and optional pre-built META-INF/jandex.idx index

actors.name: Jandex Library
actors.role: Builds/reads bytecode index (Index, Indexer, IndexReader) to query implementors

use_cases.name: Discover Kafka Connect Components
use_cases.description: Top-level use case. Orchestrates JAR indexing then queries each of the 4 component types. Returns empty map with warning if no KC JARs found.

use_cases.name: Scan Classpath for KC JARs
use_cases.description: Iterates over 4 component interfaces. For each, uses ClassLoader.getResources(META-INF/services/<interface>) to find jar:file:// URLs. Deduplicates by JAR filename.

use_cases.name: Index KC JAR File
use_cases.description: Tries pre-built index first (UC4); falls back to class-by-class scanning (UC5). Returns Optional.empty() on failure.

use_cases.name: Load Pre-built Jandex Index
use_cases.description: Opens jar:file:<path>!/META-INF/jandex.idx as stream; uses IndexReader.read(). Returns Optional.empty() silently if file absent.

use_cases.name: Build Jandex Index from JAR Classes
use_cases.description: Opens JarFile, streams all entries ending in .class, feeds each InputStream to Indexer.index(), completes with Indexer.complete().

use_cases.name: Query Index for Component Implementations
use_cases.description: For a given interface DotName calls Index.getAllKnownImplementors(). Filters: class name starts with 'org.apache.kafka.', not abstract. Loads each via Class.forName().

use_cases.name: Extract JAR Path from URL
use_cases.description: Parses 'jar:file:/path/to.jar!/...' URL, strips jar: prefix and !-suffix, converts URI to filesystem path.

use_case_relationships: UC1 <<include>> UC6 (query each component type after indexing)
UC2 <<include>> UC7 (extract path from jar URL)
UC3 <<extend>> UC5 (fall back to class scanning if no pre-built index)
filters_applied: Class must not be abstract (Modifier.isAbstract check)
Class must be loadable via Class.forName() (ClassNotFoundException skipped with warn)
key_classes: KafkaConnectDiscoveryService — main service (no Spring/CDI annotations, plain Java)
ComponentType — enum with 4 values; fields: id (String), displayName (String)
KafkaConnectDiscoveryServiceTest — 4 JUnit 5 tests covering null-safety, all types present, org.apache.kafka filter, no-abstract filter
important_notes: No dependency injection framework; KafkaConnectDiscoveryService is instantiated directly.
JAR deduplication by filename prevents double-indexing same JAR found via multiple service files.
TODO comment at line 148: KIP-1273 (KC 4.3) introduces ConnectPlugin interface for unified discovery.
Jandex library (org.jboss.jandex) is the bytecode indexing engine — not reflection-based scanning.
META-INF/services lookup mimics Java ServiceLoader pattern but uses Jandex not ServiceLoader directly.
